title: ayenia paniculata
intro: Ayenia paniculata, also known as the 'Coral Root', is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It is a woody vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant's roots and stems contain various bioactive compounds that exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Ayenia paniculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
